FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Smoke in the Hills
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Settlers report seeing smoke rising from a cabin deep in the wilderness near your settlement. Investigation reveals a hermit scholar surrounded by towering stacks of books, half-finished experiments, and scrawled equations covering every surface. They seem surprised to have visitors, but not entirely displeased.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Invite them to join the settlement. We could use a brilliant mind.
Respect their solitude. Send gifts and research materials instead.
Leave the hermit be. We have our own researchers.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: The Scholar Arrives
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The hermit reluctantly agrees to relocate, hauling cartloads of books and equipment. Their knowledge is vast and their contributions immediate — research output surges. Unfortunately, their personality is... difficult. They argue with everyone, keep bizarre hours, and their experiments occasionally produce unsettling smells.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Correspondence
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The hermit accepts your gifts graciously and begins exchanging letters with your researchers. The correspondence is slow — the hermit writes in dense, cryptic prose — but the insights are useful. A steady trickle of breakthroughs emerges from the exchange.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Eureka!
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc:
One morning, the hermit bursts from their workshop shouting incoherently about a breakthrough. After calming them down and getting a proper explanation, your researchers quickly see the light — a fundamental advance that permanently reshapes the settlement's research capabilities.
Even more surprisingly, the hermit's success mellows them considerably. They settle into community life with newfound contentment, even offering medical insights from their pharmaceutical experiments.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: The Outburst
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc:
The hermit suffers a spectacular breakdown — smashing equipment, burning notes, and screaming about failures both real and imagined. They flee into the wilderness, leaving behind a devastated laboratory. Research output drops as your team picks up the pieces.
However, the hermit's surviving notes contain surprisingly useful insights that, once deciphered, permanently advance your understanding.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: An Invitation
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: After weeks of correspondence, the hermit finally invites your researchers to visit their workshop. This is extraordinary — the hermit is notoriously reclusive. They want to collaborate on a project that's too complex for letters alone. Who do you send?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Send our top researchers. This collaboration could be historic.
Send promising apprentices. They'll learn more from this than any school.
Send no one. We can't spare the labor.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Apprentice Training
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The hermit is displeased to be sent a bunch of wide-eyed students rather than peer collaborators, and they make this opinion well known. But, surprisingly, they don't turn your people away. There may yet be a gain.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Apprentices Trained
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The apprentices return transformed — full of new ideas, techniques, and confidence. The hermit's teaching methods are unorthodox but effective. Research improves, and the trained apprentices also bring practical insights that improve general worker efficiency.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Apprentice Training
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The hermit is displeased to be sent a bunch of wide-eyed students rather than peer collaborators, and they make this opinion well known. But, surprisingly, they don't turn your people away. There may yet be a gain.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Apprentices Transformed
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc:
The apprentices return transformed — into horrific organic monstrosities!
Their minds apparently shattered, they swoop down onto your settlement in the dark of night, attacking everything in sight with wild abandon. The militia is eventually able to put them down, but not before they cause untold chaos and destruction.
In the aftermath, your people swiftly return to the hermit to demand answers. But when they arrive, the hermit is gone without a trace, save for a single note disparaging you for not respecting their intellect.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Expert Collaboration
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your top researchers are working with the hermit toward something they assure you is extraordinary. In the meantime, you'll have to make do with slightly less labor.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Expert Collaboration
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your top researchers spend weeks at the hermit's workshop. The collaboration is intense and productive — the hermit's theoretical brilliance combined with your team's practical expertise produces breakthroughs neither could achieve alone. The settlement's research capabilities are permanently enhanced.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Expert Collaboration
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your top researchers are working with the hermit toward something they assure you is extraordinary. In the meantime, you'll have to make do with slightly less labor.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Collaboration Failure
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc:
The collaboration with the hermit ends in a failure. The hermit's ideas proved too strange and esoteric for your researchers to grasp; some of them are convinced that the hermit is actually little more than a raving lunatic.
There remains something to be learned from the hermit's notes and equipment, at least.
